rationale: The cited paper appears only in brief grouped citations: once to support that IDC data are widely used in PC-industry research, and once as a comparative reference when discussing possible endogeneity of distribution coverage. The citing article does not adopt the cited paper's structural channel-value framework, simulation approach, or findings in its hypotheses or core multimarket-contact model. Because the reference serves as background precedent rather than a distinct building block for the contribution, this is a passing mention.
